description: Bifolio of accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: 11th or 12th century. Mentions Ibn ʿAzrūn; M[...] b. Khalaf; Yosef b. Simḥa; Abū l-Khayr; Ibn Bishr; al-Talmid; and. Abū Naṣr. Most of the text is crossed out. On one nearly blank folio the word nuqila (נקל) appears, likely indicating the transfer of the data to another type of ledger (by analogy with state documents bearing the same annotation).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
